human-review.evidence: Kevin: supervised each app-run batch boundary live (2026-07-04) and approved the epic close-out ('do it'); post-epic verification: cross-feature integration suite green (1890/1890 vitest), full Playwright e2e 179/185 with the 5 failures adjudicated as a box-wide environmental clipboard wedge (proven outside the app), typecheck green. Recorded 2026-07-05.

loopbacks.reason: TEST-2105's three vectors send a per-pane window frame BEFORE any pty:data for that pane — F17's own pinned contract (D4/REQ-007, agent-flow-gate lazy tracking) IGNORES windows for gate-untracked panes, so the pane never pauses and the vectors fail against a correct implementation. Tests-phase fix: seed one small emission to create the gate record before the per-pane window frame (or use the connection-wide default), keeping the vectors' semantics (pause under the loser's stall; resume at steal; fresh winner window) intact. Test-file-only change; freeze re-captured at the tests gate per the 0018/0019/0020 loopback precedent.

Review filed 3 code-addressable findings (FINDING-001 MEDIUM non-holder release strips the holder, repro-verified; FINDING-002 LOW res-after-revocation window under a reentrant sink; FINDING-003 LOW nested-bind clobber violating newest-wins — both codex-cross-check-verified traces). None blocking; fixed eagerly in thorough mode per the 0020 precedent. Each fix needs a pinned vector (TDD): route through the tests phase first — add TEST-2113/2114/2115 to the lease suite RED, freeze re-capture, then implement the holdsLease/revoked-guard/nested-bind-recheck fixes and re-derive the implement gate.

implementer.reason: Re-entry after the review->tests loopback (FINDING-001/002/003 vectors): three surgical fixes — session.ts holdsLease flag (end() releases the store ONLY while holding: never-bound and displaced connections skip unbind, FINDING-001), the revoked inbound guard (onItem drops everything from the revocation instant, so nothing can follow the final lease:revoked frame even under a reentrant sink, FINDING-002), and session-store.ts bind()'s post-callback bound re-check (a nested newer bind issued inside the revocation callback holds; the older outer bind self-displaces — newest-wins preserved, FINDING-003). All 25 lease vectors + adjacent agent suites green; implement gate re-derived green (build+test+both freezes); typecheck exit 0.
